ruling: Proposal accepted. The trace is valid and fully reproducible from the spec. The fix is mechanically correct and compositionally clean with step 2.

basis.trace_notes: OBProduceEffect includes session in Fill messages. CEProcessFill consumes from msgs_ob_to_ce and constructs the MFR without echoing that session. OBReceiveMFR has no OB session guard. Post-OBViewChange, ob_primary advances but msgs_ob_to_ce retains stale Fills. The phantom CEFinalization path is closed.
basis.fix_notes: Echo is a pure message field addition (no new state variables). Guard is a conjunct addition to OBReceiveMFR's existential (no UNCHANGED clause changes required). Both changes are minimal and reversible.
basis.orthogonality_notes: Step 2 guards CE session staleness (msg.session = ob_cached_ce_session[m]). Step 4 guards OB session staleness (msg.ob_session = ob_primary[m]). Independent failure modes, independent guards, no field collision. Combined guard after both steps: msg.market = m /\ msg.session = ob_cached_ce_session[m] /\ msg.ob_session = ob_primary[m].

property_preservation: All properties preserved. P3/P5/P10/P13/P14 verified by reviewer and unchallenged. P1 caveat (ob_session field invisible to TypeInvariant) matches existing spec pattern.

open_observations.description: Stale MFRs with wrong ob_session accumulate under strong fairness (LoseCEtoOB has no fairness constraint). Matches existing msgs_view_change pattern. Not a blocker.
OBFinalizationFillCoherence property not formally defined. Appropriate deferral to a future properties pass.
Multiple stale Fills from same defunct OB session produce multiple stale MFRs. All blocked post-OBViewChange. No partial acceptance scenario.
